command: ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no jose@192.168.0.201 'sudo bash -c "sed -i \"s|location /wetty-ollama {|location /uptime { proxy_pass http://127.0.0.1:3010; proxy_http_version 1.1; proxy_set_header Upgrade \\\$http_upgrade; proxy_set_header Connection upgrade; proxy_set_header Host \\\$host; }\\n    location /wetty-ollama {|\" /etc/nginx/sites-available/wetty && nginx -t && systemctl reload nginx && echo NGINX_OK"'
